creator: van.woerkom@netcologne.de
text:
Hi, the realplayer 7 version I used (b2 - beta 2?)

    7926101 Aug  5 22:16 /usr/ports/distfiles/rp7_linux20_libc6_i386_b2_rpm

expired. I just downloaded a new one, and obviously they bumped
the version to rp 8:

    MD5 (rp8_linux20_libc6_i386_cs1_rpm) = a6503993cc1f5d38f2bd135f6fffcf8c

Fix: 

Perhaps not much except name and md5 signature has to be changed with
the port. I'll try it.

Regards,
Marc
How-To-Repeat: 
    start rp7/b2
